postReviewPolish: All 8 findings adversarially rejected (spec satisfied; documented design intent). As an a11y enhancement (not a fixed defect), the Clock now composes its aria-label as label+value ('Місцевий час 12:05') — mirroring the ComfortBadge pattern — falling back to the label-only during the --:-- placeholder so AT never reads the placeholder as a time. Battery stayed green.
